title: Woodland Wins Houston Open
excerpt: Gary Woodland claims Houston Open title, Højgaard finishes second
body:
Tour News: Woodland Triumphs in Houston

Gary Woodland has taken the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, finishing with a score of -18. Nicolai Højgaard came in second, just one stroke behind. The tournament saw a strong field of competitors, with several big names vying for the top spot.

DP World Tour Update

Eugenio Chacarra is currently leading the DP World Tour event in India, with a four-stroke lead going into the final round. The tournament is being held at the DLF G&CC in Gurugram, India, and is sure to be an exciting conclusion to the weekend.

LIV Golf Latest

The LIV Golf tour recently held an event in Singapore, with the 4Aces GC team taking the top spot. The team, which includes several big names in golf, finished with a score of -27, beating out the Ripper GC team by several strokes.

Stats from the Houston Open

Woodland's Winning Score:
-18
Højgaard's Second Place Score:
-17
Lowest Round of the Tournament:
63
Most Birdies in a Round:
7

The Houston Open was a thrilling tournament, with several players making a strong push for the top spot. In the end, it was Woodland's consistency that paid off, as he took home the title with a score of -18.
